Which Plan is Right for You?
Compare all Tradeify account types and find the perfect evaluation or funded account option for your trading style.

April 2, 2026

Table of contents

SELECT vs Growth vs Lightning Funded

Choosing the right account type depends on several key factors: your preferred drawdown tracking method, budget considerations, trading timeline, and risk tolerance. Let's break down each option to help you make a decision.

SELECT Evaluation

Growth Evaluation

Lightning Funded

One-time purchase

One-time purchase

One-time payment

No activation fee

No activation fee

N/A

End of Day Drawdown

End of Day Drawdown

End of Day Drawdown

No Daily Loss Limit

Daily Loss Limit

Daily Loss Limit

Can purchase a reset if failed

Can purchase a reset if failed

No resets - replacement only

You need to pass an evaluation before getting to funded stage

You need to pass an evaluation before getting to funded stage

Immediate funding - skip the evaluation stage

Detailed Account Breakdown

SELECT Evaluation

Best for: Traders who want a unified evaluation process with flexible funded account options

Pricing & Costs:

- One-time purchase: $95 - $215 (no recurring fees)

- No activation fee: Transition to funded account is seamless with no additional costs

- Failed account: Can purchase a reset to try again

- Funded in 3 days: Fast path to funded trading after passing evaluation

Trading Features:

- End of Day trailing drawdown (more intraday flexibility)

- No daily loss limits during evaluation

- 40% consistency requirement (encourages stable performance)

- Tier 1 news trading allowed

- $1,500, $3,000, $6,000, $9,000 Profit target to pass the evaluation (25K, 50K, 100K, 150K accounts)

- Choose your payout policy after passing: Select Flex (5-Day) or Select Daily

Growth Evaluation

Best for: Traders who prefer more flexibility during the trading day with end-of-day risk assessment

Pricing & Costs:

- One-time purchase: $99 - $349 (no recurring fees)

- No activation fee: (transition to a sim funded account is seamless)

- Failed account: Can purchase a reset to try again

- Lower cost but has Daily Loss Limit

Trading Features:

- End-of-day trailing drawdown

- Daily loss limits apply

- End-of-day realized P&L tracking

- More flexibility during trading hours

- $3000, $6000, $9000 Profit target to pass the Evaluation

Lightning Funded

Best for: Proven traders who want immediate funding who want to skip the evaluation phase

Pricing & Costs:

- One-time payment: $349 - $729 (no recurring fees)

- No monthly subscriptions or hidden fees

- No resets available - must purchase replacement if account fails

- Most cost-effective for long-term successful traders

Trading Features:

- End-of-day trailing drawdown

- Immediate access to funded account

- Skip the evaluation phase entirely

- Daily loss limits apply

- Profit Goals to achieve payouts

- Progressive consistency required for payouts: 20% (first payout) → 25% (second) → 30% (third+)

Drawdown Types for Each Account Type Explained

SELECT Evaluation Features

How it works: Unified evaluation with End of Day drawdown and no daily loss limits, giving you flexibility to choose your funded strategy after passing.

Advantages:

- No activation fees - start immediately after purchasing

- End of Day drawdown provides intraday trading flexibility

- Choose your payout policy after proving your skills (5-Day Flex or Daily)

- 40% consistency requirement builds sustainable trading habits

- Funded in 3 days after passing

Considerations:

- One-time purchase cost ($95-$215)

- 40% consistency requirement during evaluation

- Your payout policy choice is permanent once selected

End-of-Day Trailing Drawdown (SELECT, Growth & Lightning Funded)

How it works: Your drawdown limit adjusts only at the end of the trading day based on your highest balance.

Advantages:

- Greater flexibility during trading hours

- Temporary intraday losses don't affect drawdown limit

- Growth: No activation fee

Considerations:

- Daily loss limits apply

- Growth: Has Daily Loss Limit (DLL)

- Lightning Funded: If you fail the account, you need to replace it with a new one

Which to Choose?

Choose SELECT if you:

- Want a unified evaluation without choosing payout strategy upfront

- Prefer no activation fees

- Value End of Day drawdown for more intraday flexibility

- Want to decide on your payout approach after proving your skills

- Appreciate the 40% consistency requirement for building stable habits

- Want fast funding (funded in 3 days)

Choose Growth if you:

- Want flexibility during trading hours

- Prefer a more expensive upfront payment to skip the activation fees

- Are comfortable with a higher one-time cost for no DLL

- Prefer end-of-day settlements

Choose Lightning Funded if you:

- Want immediate funding without evaluation

- Want to skip the evaluation entirely

- Have confidence in your long-term trading success

- Want to skip the evaluation phase entirely

- Are experienced and proven profitable

Reset Policies

Evaluation Resets (SELECT & Growth):

- SELECT: One-time purchase; can buy a reset if your account fails

- Growth: One-time purchase; can buy a reset if your account fails

- Continuous opportunity to retry

- Can reset manually to try again earlier

Lightning Funded:

- No reset option available

- Must purchase replacement account if failed

- Higher upfront cost but no recurring fees

- Best for confident, experienced traders

For more information about the different drawdown types and specific examples, click here.

Another key factor to consider is the payout policy for each account type.

You can review our various payout policies below:

- SELECT Flex and SELECT Daily Payout Policies

- Growth Sim Funded Payout Policy

- Lightning Funded Payout Policy
